dct_description_sm: Bar scale on map given in “Milliaria Germanica Com” (15 units [= 3.3 cm]).
Latitudinal and longitudinal lines along margins.
Folio number in upper right corner, obscured.
From Mercator’s Atlas minor, Amsterdam: Janssonius, l628.
